title: Rocks Comes to Elbaf
description: On pages 13–13, this part follows Unknown person #13, King Harald, Usopp, Rocks D. Xebec, World Government as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The pirate island of Hachinosu was abuzz with excitement...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Welcome! I'm so happy to see you!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Shaky's rip-off bar had finally opened...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They say the wait just to get in would take over a month.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shakuyaku was like a flower blooming in dry Wasteland...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The inhabitants of Hachinosu came to cover her as a treasure...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Her very presence enriched the island.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Very well, relay this to Harald...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unfortunately, a treasure is always the inevitable target of theft...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We shall accept Elbaf's admission into the world government on one condition:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's what it will take for hard to gain admission???

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
